_instructions: 1. Delete this _instructions field before running the ingestion script.
2. Replace every FILL: placeholder with real values from the source_url page.
3. Set ambiguous_fields to a list of field names you could not confirm exactly.
5. The script assigns an ID, timestamps the record, and adds it to staging.
6. After a second-person review: npx tsx scripts/add-scholarship.ts --promote <id>
name: FILL: Official scholarship name exactly as it appears on the source page
provider: FILL: Awarding body — e.g. 'Ministry of Education, Government of India'
official_url: FILL: Root or landing page URL that students should visit to apply
source_url: FILL: Exact URL of the page where YOU read the eligibility criteria
source_name: FILL: Human-readable source — e.g. 'NSP portal — Central Sector Scheme detail page'
deadline: FILL: YYYY-MM-DD — if approximate or rolling, note that in verification_note
summary: FILL: 1–3 sentence plain-language description of who the scholarship is for and what it provides.
source_note: FILL: One sentence describing where this data was sourced from, e.g. 'Verified against NSP portal guidelines document, April 2026.'
verification_note: FILL: List anything you could not confirm — e.g. 'Deadline listed as Oct 2025 on portal but may be updated; income limit stated as 4.5L but official circular says 6L for certain categories.'
